title: Lily and the Magic Backpack
synopsis: When Lily finds a sparkly backpack at school, magical fairy tale characters start popping out! She must help them find their way back to their stories before the school day ends.

pages.text: Lily skipped into her classroom on Monday morning. She loved school! Her teacher, Ms. Chen, was putting books on the shelf. "Good morning, Lily!" said Ms. Chen with a big smile. Lily hung up her coat and looked around. Something sparkly caught her eye.

illustration.description: A bright classroom with colorful posters on the walls. Lily, a girl with curly brown hair and dark skin, wearing a yellow dress, looks excited as she enters. Ms. Chen, an Asian woman with short black hair wearing a purple cardigan, smiles warmly while arranging books. Morning sunlight streams through windows.
illustration.alt: Lily entering her colorful classroom where Ms. Chen is organizing books

pages.text: In the lost and found box was a beautiful backpack. It was purple and pink with silver stars that seemed to twinkle. "Whose backpack is that?" Lily asked. "I don't know," said Ms. Chen. "It appeared this morning. Very strange!" The backpack wiggled a little bit. Lily rubbed her eyes. Did she really see that?

illustration.description: A magical purple and pink backpack with sparkling silver stars sits in a wooden lost and found box. The backpack seems to glow with a soft magical light. Lily points at it with wide, curious eyes while Ms. Chen looks puzzled. The classroom background shows other students arriving.
illustration.alt: A magical sparkly backpack in the lost and found box

pages.text: During reading time, Lily sat near the mystery backpack. She was reading about three little pigs when - POP! A tiny pig wearing a red vest jumped out of the backpack! "Help!" squeaked the pig. "The big bad wolf is after me!" Lily's mouth fell open. Her friend Marcus looked over. "Did that pig just talk?" he whispered.

illustration.description: A small cartoon pig in a red vest pops out of the magical backpack with sparkles around him. Lily, sitting cross-legged with a book in her lap, looks amazed with her mouth open. Marcus, a boy with dark skin and short hair, peers over with wide surprised eyes. Other children sit on colorful carpet squares reading books.
illustration.alt: A tiny pig in a red vest popping out of the backpack while Lily and Marcus watch in amazement

pages.text: Before Lily could answer, POP! POP! Two more little pigs jumped out! One wore a blue hat. One wore green overalls. "We need to build houses!" they all cried together. The other kids started to notice. Zara pointed and giggled. "Look at the tiny pigs!" she said. Ms. Chen was helping another student and didn't see them yet.

illustration.description: Three little pigs in colorful clothing (red vest, blue hat, green overalls) dance around the magical backpack. Zara, a girl with long black hair and brown skin, points and laughs. Other diverse children in the classroom look excited and surprised. The scene is whimsical with magical sparkles in the air.
illustration.alt: Three little pigs in different outfits appearing from the backpack as children watch

pages.text: "You came from my storybook!" Lily whispered to the pigs. "How do we get you home?" The first pig scratched his head with his tiny hoof. "We need to finish our story," he said. "But the wolf isn't here yet." Just then, the backpack shook again. Something big was trying to get out!

illustration.description: Lily kneels down talking to the three little pigs who look worried. The magical backpack behind them shakes and glows more intensely with purple and pink light. The classroom setting shows bookshelves and reading corner. The mood is anticipatory and magical with swirling sparkles around the shaking backpack.
illustration.alt: Lily talking to the three little pigs while the magical backpack shakes behind them

pages.text: POOF! A girl with golden hair tumbled out. She was very small, just like the pigs. "I'm Goldilocks!" she announced. "Has anyone seen three bears?" Right behind her came Little Red Riding Hood carrying a tiny basket. "I'm looking for my grandma's house," she said sweetly. Lily couldn't believe her eyes. All her favorite fairy tale friends were here!

illustration.description: Goldilocks, a tiny girl with curly golden hair in a blue dress, tumbles out with sparkles. Little Red Riding Hood, also small, wears her iconic red hooded cape and carries a wicker basket. The three little pigs cheer nearby. Lily sits amazed surrounded by all these tiny fairy tale characters in the bright classroom.
illustration.alt: Goldilocks and Little Red Riding Hood joining the three little pigs around Lily

pages.text: Marcus crawled over to help. "This is so cool!" he said. Zara joined them too. "What can we do?" she asked. The tiny characters looked worried. "We don't belong here," said Little Red Riding Hood. "We need to get back to our stories or we'll disappear forever!" Lily felt scared. She had to help her new friends!

illustration.description: Lily, Marcus, and Zara sit in a circle with all the tiny fairy tale characters in the middle. The children look concerned and determined to help. The fairy tale characters appear worried, with Little Red Riding Hood looking particularly sad. The magical backpack glows softly in the background with warm, comforting light.
illustration.alt: Three children sitting with worried fairy tale characters, planning how to help them

pages.text: "I have an idea!" said Lily. "What if we act out your stories? Maybe that will send you home!" The fairy tale friends looked hopeful. "But we need the other characters too," said Goldilocks. "Where are the three bears?" As if the backpack heard her, it wiggled again. Out popped three tiny bears wearing aprons!

illustration.description: Lily stands excitedly with her finger pointing up, having a bright idea. Three small bears in colorful aprons emerge from the magical backpack with golden sparkles. Goldilocks claps her hands happily while the other fairy tale characters look hopeful. The scene is bright and optimistic with warm lighting.
illustration.alt: Lily having an idea while three bears in aprons pop out of the magical backpack

pages.text: Soon they had everyone they needed. Marcus pretended to be the big bad wolf. "I'll huff and I'll puff!" he said in a funny deep voice. Zara helped Goldilocks find the bears' pretend porridge bowls. The fairy tale friends began to glow softly. "It's working!" squealed the first little pig. "We can feel our story calling us home!"

illustration.description: Marcus crouches down pretending to be the wolf, making a silly fierce face. Zara helps arrange tiny pretend bowls for the bears and Goldilocks. All the fairy tale characters glow with soft, magical light. The scene is playful and energetic with the children fully engaged in the imaginative play.
illustration.alt: Children acting out fairy tale scenes while the tiny characters begin to glow

pages.text: The backpack began to spin slowly in the air! All the tiny friends started floating toward it. "Thank you, Lily!" called Little Red Riding Hood. "You're the best!" shouted the three little pigs. One by one, they floated back into the magical backpack with happy sparkles all around them.

illustration.description: The magical backpack spins in the air with rainbow sparkles swirling around it. All the tiny fairy tale characters float gracefully toward it, waving goodbye with big smiles. Lily, Marcus, and Zara wave back with joy. The scene is magical and heartwarming with lots of glittery effects and warm colors.
illustration.alt: Fairy tale characters floating back into the spinning magical backpack while children wave goodbye

pages.text: The backpack gently floated back down to the lost and found box. It looked like a normal backpack now - no more sparkles or wiggling. Ms. Chen walked over. "You three have been playing so nicely together," she said. "What were you doing?" Lily, Marcus, and Zara looked at each other and smiled.

illustration.description: The backpack sits peacefully in the lost and found box, now looking ordinary without magical sparkles. Ms. Chen approaches the three children who sit together looking happy but secretive. The classroom is back to normal with other children reading quietly. The mood is content and slightly mysterious.
illustration.alt: The now-normal backpack in the lost and found box with Ms. Chen talking to the three children

pages.text: "Just playing fairy tales!" said Lily with a giggle. That afternoon, someone came to pick up the backpack. It was a little old woman with twinkling eyes. "Thank you for taking care of my special backpack," she whispered to Lily. "The fairy tale friends told me how kind you were." Then she winked and walked away. Lily grinned. What an amazing day at school!

illustration.description: A kind elderly woman with silver hair and twinkling blue eyes carries the backpack. She wears a cozy purple shawl and has a mysterious, magical smile. Lily watches her leave through the classroom doorway with wonder in her eyes. The late afternoon sunlight creates a warm, golden glow around the scene.
illustration.alt: A mysterious elderly woman taking the backpack while Lily watches with wonder

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What color was the magical backpack?
questions.explanation: The magical backpack was purple and pink with silver stars that twinkled!

questions.question: Who was the first character to pop out of the backpack?
questions.explanation: A tiny pig wearing a red vest was the first character to jump out of the backpack!

questions.question: How did Lily help the fairy tale characters get home?
choices: She acted out their stories with friends
She put them back in the backpack
questions.explanation: Lily, Marcus, and Zara acted out the fairy tale stories, which helped the characters return home!

questions.question: Who came to pick up the backpack at the end?
questions.explanation: A little old woman with twinkling eyes came to pick up her special backpack.

questions.question: What did Marcus pretend to be?
questions.explanation: Marcus pretended to be the big bad wolf and said 'I'll huff and I'll puff!' in a funny deep voice.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.instructions: Fill in the missing words from the story!
pages.text: Lily found a _____ backpack in the lost and found box. When fairy tale _____ popped out, she decided to _____ them get back to their stories by acting them out with her friends.

pages.title: Character Match
pages.instructions: Match the fairy tale characters with what they said!
pages.text: The three little pigs said 'We need to build _____!' Goldilocks asked 'Has anyone seen three _____?' Little Red Riding Hood said 'I'm looking for my _____.'
